testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year
[NONE][CKV_AWS_66] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group specifies retention days
[NONE][CKV_AWS_158] Ensure that CloudWatch Log Group is encrypted by KMS
[NONE][CKV_AWS_60] Ensure IAM role allows only specific services or principals to assume it
[NONE][CKV_AWS_393] Ensure AWS GitHub Actions OIDC authorization policies only allow safe claims and claim order on IAM role
[NONE][CKV_AWS_274] Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy
[NONE][CKV_AWS_61] Ensure AWS IAM policy does not allow assume role permission across all services
[NONE][CKV_AWS_287] Ensure IAM policies does not allow credentials exposure
[NONE][CKV_AWS_62] Ensure IAM policies that allow full "*-*" administrative privileges are not created
[NONE][CKV_AWS_355] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's resource for restrictable actions
[NONE][CKV_AWS_63] Ensure no IAM policies documents allow "*" as a statement's actions

failure.message: Ensure CloudFront distributions should have origin failover configured

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.cdn.aws_cloudfront_distribution.frontend File: /iac/modules/cdn/main.tf: 25-99 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-310
Code lines for this resource are too many. Please use IDE of your choice to review the file.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_150] Ensure that Load Balancer has deletion protection enabled

failure.message: Ensure that Load Balancer has deletion protection enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.compute.aws_lb.main File: /iac/modules/compute/alb.tf: 5-18 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-150
5 | resource "aws_lb" "main" { 6 | name = "${var.name_prefix}-alb" 7 | internal = false 8 | load_balancer_type = "application" 9 | security_groups = [var.alb_security_group_id] 10 | subnets = var.public_subnet_ids 11 | 12 | enable_deletion_protection = var.environment == "prod" ? true : false 13 | 14 | tags = { 15 | Name = "${var.name_prefix}-alb" 16 | Environment = var.environment 17 | } 18 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_131] Ensure that ALB drops HTTP headers

failure.message: Ensure that ALB drops HTTP headers

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.compute.aws_lb.main File: /iac/modules/compute/alb.tf: 5-18 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-that-alb-drops-http-headers
5 | resource "aws_lb" "main" { 6 | name = "${var.name_prefix}-alb" 7 | internal = false 8 | load_balancer_type = "application" 9 | security_groups = [var.alb_security_group_id] 10 | subnets = var.public_subnet_ids 11 | 12 | enable_deletion_protection = var.environment == "prod" ? true : false 13 | 14 | tags = { 15 | Name = "${var.name_prefix}-alb" 16 | Environment = var.environment 17 | } 18 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_91] Ensure the ELBv2 (Application/Network) has access logging enabled

failure.message: Ensure the ELBv2 (Application/Network) has access logging enabled

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.compute.aws_lb.main File: /iac/modules/compute/alb.tf: 5-18 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/bc-aws-logging-22
5 | resource "aws_lb" "main" { 6 | name = "${var.name_prefix}-alb" 7 | internal = false 8 | load_balancer_type = "application" 9 | security_groups = [var.alb_security_group_id] 10 | subnets = var.public_subnet_ids 11 | 12 | enable_deletion_protection = var.environment == "prod" ? true : false 13 | 14 | tags = { 15 | Name = "${var.name_prefix}-alb" 16 | Environment = var.environment 17 | } 18 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_2] Ensure ALB protocol is HTTPS
[NONE][CKV_AWS_338] Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

failure.message: Ensure CloudWatch log groups retains logs for at least 1 year

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.compute.aws_cloudwatch_log_group.app File: /iac/modules/compute/main.tf: 95-99 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-logging-policies/bc-aws-338
95 | resource "aws_cloudwatch_log_group" "app" { 96 | name = "/ecs/${var.name_prefix}-app" 97 | retention_in_days = 30 98 | kms_key_id = var.secrets_kms_key_arn # Reusamos KMS para encriptar logs 99 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_32] Ensure CloudFront distribution has a response headers policy attached

failure.message: Ensure CloudFront distribution has a response headers policy attached

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.cdn.aws_cloudfront_distribution.frontend File: /iac/modules/cdn/main.tf: 25-99 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/bc-aws-networking-65
Code lines for this resource are too many. Please use IDE of your choice to review the file.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_20] Ensure that ALB redirects HTTP requests into HTTPS ones

failure.message: Ensure that ALB redirects HTTP requests into HTTPS ones

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.compute.aws_lb.main File: /iac/modules/compute/alb.tf: 5-18 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/ensure-that-alb-redirects-http-requests-into-https-ones
5 | resource "aws_lb" "main" { 6 | name = "${var.name_prefix}-alb" 7 | internal = false 8 | load_balancer_type = "application" 9 | security_groups = [var.alb_security_group_id] 10 | subnets = var.public_subnet_ids 11 | 12 | enable_deletion_protection = var.environment == "prod" ? true : false 13 | 14 | tags = { 15 | Name = "${var.name_prefix}-alb" 16 | Environment = var.environment 17 | } 18 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_378] Ensure AWS Load Balancer doesn't use HTTP protocol

failure.message: Ensure AWS Load Balancer doesn't use HTTP protocol

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.compute.aws_lb_target_group.app File: /iac/modules/compute/alb.tf: 24-44 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-networking-policies/bc-aws-378
24 | resource "aws_lb_target_group" "app" { 25 | name = "${var.name_prefix}-tg" 26 | port = var.container_port 27 | protocol = "HTTP" 28 | vpc_id = var.vpc_id 29 | target_type = "ip" # Requerido para Fargate awsvpc 30 | 31 | health_check { 32 | path = "/health" 33 | interval = 30 34 | timeout = 5 35 | healthy_threshold = 3 36 | unhealthy_threshold = 3 37 | matcher = "200-299" 38 | } 39 | 40 | tags = { 41 | Name = "${var.name_prefix}-tg" 42 | Environment = var.environment 43 | } 44 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_103] Ensure that load balancer is using at least TLS 1.2

failure.message: Ensure that load balancer is using at least TLS 1.2

testcase.failure:
Resource: module.compute.aws_lb_listener.https[0] File: /iac/modules/compute/alb.tf: 50-63 Guideline: https://docs.prismacloud.io/en/enterprise-edition/policy-reference/aws-policies/aws-general-policies/bc-aws-general-43
50 | resource "aws_lb_listener" "https" { 51 | count = var.acm_certificate_arn != "" && var.acm_certificate_arn != null ? 1 : 0 52 | 53 | load_balancer_arn = aws_lb.main.arn 54 | port = "443" 55 | protocol = "HTTPS" 56 | ssl_policy = "ELBSecurityPolicy-2016-08" 57 | certificate_arn = var.acm_certificate_arn 58 | 59 | default_action { 60 | type = "forward" 61 | target_group_arn = aws_lb_target_group.app.arn 62 | } 63 | }

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_103] Ensure that load balancer is using at least TLS 1.2

failure.message: Ensure that load balancer is using at least TLS 1.2

failure.message: Ensure AWS Load Balancers use strong ciphers

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV_AWS_260] Ensure no security groups allow ingress from 0.0.0.0:0 to port 80

skipped.message: "El ALB necesita recibir tráfico HTTP abierto para poder redirigirlo a HTTPS"

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_57] Ensure Secrets Manager secrets should have automatic rotation enabled

skipped.message: Las claves de proveedores externos se gestionan en sus respectivos portales; AWS no tiene control para rotarlas automáticamente.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_57] Ensure Secrets Manager secrets should have automatic rotation enabled

skipped.message: La rotación dinámica del secreto JWT sin manejo de estado invalidaría abruptamente las sesiones activas de los usuarios.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_57] Ensure Secrets Manager secrets should have automatic rotation enabled

skipped.message: La rotación automatizada interrumpiría las conexiones persistentes de los contenedores; se asume como procedimiento operativo administrado.

testcase.name: [NONE][CKV2_AWS_5] Ensure that Security Groups are attached to another resource

skipped.message: "Este SG se exporta y asocia dinámicamente en el módulo principal o módulos dependientes"

skipped.message: "Este SG se exporta y asocia dinámicamente en el módulo principal o módulos dependientes"
